site.title: Party Discipline
site.tagline: How often do Estonian MPs vote against their own faction?

members.heading: Riigikogu members
members.subheading: Discipline score measures how often a member votes with their faction's majority position. Procedural votes (presence checks, agenda adoption) are excluded.
members.empty: No data yet. Run the scraper to populate the database.

statistika.heading: Statistics
statistika.intro: Speaking activity in the 15th Riigikogu. Experimental.
statistika.speakersIntro: Counts of floor speeches, questions, and procedural remarks in plenary (Riigikogu statistics).
statistika.boardNote: Member of the Riigikogu board: short procedural remarks made while presiding (calling speakers, etc.) are not counted as speeches, so this figure reflects time spent presiding.
statistika.tenureNewNote: Joined the Riigikogu recently (under 3 months); a low speech count is expected.
statistika.modeAbsoluteHint: Raw totals over the whole term.
statistika.modeRateHint: Speeches per month, normalized by time served in the Riigikogu.
statistika.tenureFlagNote: Members with under 3 months served: the rate is computed but not ranked, because too small a window gives a misleadingly high rate.

nonSitting.heading: Won a seat but never took it
nonSitting.intro: Candidates who won a mandate but never entered the Riigikogu (stayed on as minister, MEP, or mayor, like Mihhail Kõlvart). Ranked by personal votes.
nonSitting.name: Name

topics.heading: Topics
topics.intro: Topics come from the official Eurovoc tags on bills.
topics.coverageNote: Showing {n} topics tied to bills; not all votes are covered.
topics.belowThreshold: {n} members had too few votes on this topic to rank (under {min}).
topics.empty: No comparable votes on this topic.

factions.heading: Factions
factions.intro: Faction cohesion (discipline), attendance, and size in the 15th Riigikogu.

memberDetail.speechesNote: Source: Riigikogu speech statistics (whole XV term).
memberDetail.boardNote: Short procedural remarks made while presiding (calling speakers, opening votes, etc.) are not counted as speeches, so this figure reflects time spent presiding.
memberDetail.tenureNote: This member has served only a short time this term, so a low speech count is expected.
memberDetail.searchHint: Search is Estonian inflection-aware (e.g. "kool" also finds "koolis", "koolide").
memberDetail.searchNoResults: No speeches found for this search.

mandateNote.personal: Won a full quota of votes outright.
mandateNote.compensation: Entered parliament via the party list.
mandateNote.substitute: Did not win a 2023 mandate; entered the Riigikogu as a substitute.
mandateNote.notElected: Ran in 2023 but was not elected.

memberDetail.formerMember: Was a member of the XV Riigikogu · no longer active
memberDetail.notInFaction: {party} member · not in a faction group
memberDetail.againstEmpty: No votes against the faction line.
memberDetail.openInRiigikogu: Open the bill on the Riigikogu website
memberDetail.againstHint: Red marks are votes against the line — click to open the bill. Scroll to zoom.
